---
title: "sequali"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Sequali

How to use sequali

```{bash}
sequali /data/raw_reads/ERR1539001.fastq.gz
```

## Filtlong

```{bash}
# for filtering
#filtlong (--min_length 1000 and either --keep_percent 90 or --min_mean_q 7)

filtlong --min_length 1000 --keep_percent 90 \
  data/raw_reads/ERR1539001.fastq.gz | gzip > data/clean_reads/ont_filtered.fastq.gz
  
```
